May Team Meeting
May 2026
The May Team Meeting is on Thursday, May 14th at 4PM ET. Check your calendar invite for the meeting link.
April Team Meeting
Apr 2026
The April Team Meeting is on Thursday, April 9th at 4PM ET. Check your calendar invite for the meeting link.
Benefits Meeting
Apr 2026 · People Ops · Benefits
The Benefits Meeting will be held on Tuesday, April 14th at 3PM ET. The meeting will be recorded for those who can't join live.
Welcome to the 10% Media Intranet
Apr 2026 · Taylor Brandariz · Director of Operations
Your one-stop hub for all company information — Company Dashboards, Policies, Team Directory, Payroll Details, and Benefits all in one place. Reach out to Taylor Brandariz with any questions.
Open Enrollment: April 20 – May 4, 2026
Apr 2026 · People Ops · Benefits
Your 2026–2027 Open Enrollment window is April 20 – May 4, 2026. Log into ADPTotalSource.adp.com or the ADP Mobile App to enroll. Don't miss the window — outside of OE, you'll need a Qualifying Life Event (marriage, birth, adoption) to make changes.

Use the "Help Me Choose" tool powered by Nayya for personalized guidance.

Questions? Contact ADP MyLife Advisors:
📞 844-448-0325
Mon–Fri, 8 a.m. – 11:30 p.m. ET · Support in English, Spanish & more.

Budget Dashboard
Open ↗
FY26 P&L tracker — expenses by department, payroll, and budget vs actuals across all owners.
Subscription Analytics
Open ↗
Live Stripe data — active subscribers, trial conversions, churn rate, and revenue vs budget goals.
YouTube Tracking
Open ↗
Video performance tracker — impressions, views, hook retention, CTR, and historical archive.
Affiliate Toolkit
Open ↗
Affiliate partner portal — brand guidelines, ready-to-use graphics, performance tips, and commission tracking.
Cash Flow Dashboard
Open ↗
Monthly cash flow tracker — income, expenses, and net cash position across all accounts.
